audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and a slow speaking rate, accompanied by heavy breathing and a sigh.
temporal_description: A close-up shot shows the right side of a man’s face, focusing on his eyes, nose, and part of his forehead. His dark hair partially covers his forehead, and his gaze is directed slightly upward and to the right. The lighting is dim and cool-toned, casting shadows across his face, and his skin appears slightly moist. The background is out of focus, suggesting an enclosed space with soft, muted tones.
